repos.name: voice-backend-v2
repos.description: FastAPI voice AI backend for auto dealerships - handles ElevenLabs/Retell AI webhooks, vehicle search, appointment scheduling, post-call processing

repos.name: admin-dashboard
repos.description: FastAPI admin dashboard backend for AllyAI - conversations, tasks, campaigns, analytics, workflows for dealership staff

repos.name: selinium-browser-automation
repos.description: Selenium browser automation for dealership appointment booking - multi-dealership flows via Xtime/direct schedulers on Cloud Run

repos.name: chatbot-backend
repos.description: AllyAI multi-tenant chatbot backend - conversational AI for dealership inventory, service appointments, parts via OpenAI + LangChain + SQLite

repos.name: firebase-backend
repos.description: FastAPI backend for AllyAI dealership platform - users, conversations, post-call AI processing, tasks, email campaigns, all backed by Firestore

repos.name: workflow-builder
repos.description: NLP-driven workflow orchestration backend for dealership outreach campaigns - LLM workflow generation, multi-channel execution (Email/SMS/Voice) via APScheduler

repos.name: ally-ai-production
repos.description: Ally AI production marketing/landing site - React 18 + Vite SPA with Supabase backend, Vapi/ElevenLabs voice, shadcn/ui, Tailwind CSS
